auditScope: Full codebase inspection: dead code, fake implementations, integration gaps, provider status

majorRisks: Permission system ceremonial (agents never call tools, only LLM)

items.reason: Defined in enum but has no provider, no job dispatch, no VRAM tracking
items.evidence: Permission enum exists but no RemoteGpuProvider or similar class exists anywhere

items.reason: Called only for REMOTE_GPU_SPEND permission, which is never actually used since no GPU provider exists
items.evidence: Budget constants exist but never consumed - no RunPod/Modal/Lambda integration
hideImageUpload: true in config but no image handler, vision model, or image encoder anywhere

items.function: All 8 SwarmPanel components (SwarmGpu, SwarmMemory, SwarmAgents, etc)
items.reason: Components are routed in App.tsx but functionality is disconnected from agent execution - UI shows swarm state but agents return empty JSON from default mock runLLM
items.evidence: SwarmPanel IS mounted (line 58 App.tsx), but since runLLM defaults/was mocked historically, showed empty results. Now runLLM is properly wired via externalProviders

items.reason: Injected as dependency but never called - legacy from old architecture
items.evidence: Intelligence orchestrator has these methods but completeWithFallback uses modelRouter directly

items.function: escalateStep() - external provider fallback for compute
items.reason: Called but always returns null gracefully; externalProviders often empty unless user configures
items.evidence: Line in executor.js: 'return null; // Escalation failed — continue with local result' (line 481)

items.reason: Base class throws 'not implemented' - subclasses must override
Uses Node.js Worker but doesn't restrict capabilities - trivially escapable
items.evidence: No capability restrictions in workers; they can access fs, network, env vars

items.reason: References Python HTTP server that doesn't exist
items.evidence: Tries to spawn Python backend but deployment missing - falls back to [STT not configured]

items.reason: Return placeholder messages when python backend unavailable
items.evidence: Routes exist but orchestrator.stt() defaults to placeholder response

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Zero wiring between extension and swarm**. Extension is unaware of MAS types, agents, topologies. Only calls Continue protocol.
integrationGaps.impact: Swarm features completely invisible to extension UI. Users can't interact with agent topologies, permissions, or task graphs from VS Code
files_involved: packages/extension/src/commands.ts - has openSwarmPanel but command does nothing
packages/agent/src/routes/swarm.js - REST API exists but extension never calls it

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Default mock wiring historically** (now fixed but was broken). Line 39 swarm.js: `runLLM: deps.runLLM || (async () => "{}")`
integrationGaps.impact: If deps.runLLM not provided, all agent calls return empty JSON. Swarm orchestrates nothing
integrationGaps.evidence: index.js line 668 now calls externalProviders.completeWithFallback(), BUT if no providers configured, still throws

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Permission system checks tools but agents never call them**. All agents just call LLM, no MCP tool invocation in agent flow
integrationGaps.impact: Permission gates are ceremonial - they gate nothing because agents don't use tools
integrationGaps.evidence: mas/agents/*.js - all agents only call this.callLLM() or this.callLLMJson(). No tool registry interaction

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Feedback loop stubbed**. Router classifies tasks (fast/standard/premium) but never collects actual performance metrics to fine-tune
integrationGaps.impact: Model selection remains static; no learning from actual latency/cost data
integrationGaps.evidence: model-runtime/router.js has getPerformanceStats() but stats never collected from actual runs

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Auto-install missing**. Compute jobs don't run 'npm install' before launching
integrationGaps.impact: Dependencies not available - jobs fail with require() errors
integrationGaps.evidence: compute/executor.js line 102+ - doesn't check package.json or install before running commands

integrationGaps.whats_missing: **Cloud provider credentials not configured**. Azure/Google translation APIs require keys not in .env
integrationGaps.impact: Translation defaults to placeholders or local (slow)
integrationGaps.evidence: i18n/orchestrator.js provider hierarchy defined but no actual credential injection

fakeProviders.name: Remote GPU Orchestration (RunPod/Modal/Lambda)
fakeProviders.why_incomplete: Budget constants exist ($2 default, $100 cap) but NO RemoteGpuProvider class, NO job dispatch middleware, NO container management, NO VRAM tracking
evidence: grep REMOTE_GPU yields only 4 matches - all in types/permissions, nothing in orchestration

fakeProviders.name: Vibe Coding (Image → Code)
fakeProviders.why_incomplete: hideImageUpload: true config exists. Zero implementation: no image handler, no vision model integration, no UI screenshot capture
evidence: No image encoder, no vision transformer
No image upload endpoint in routes

fakeProviders.name: AI4Bharat Translation Backend
fakeProviders.why_incomplete: Provider references Python HTTP server that isn't deployed. Deployment infrastructure missing entirely
evidence: Orchestrator tries to spawn Python process
No Docker container defined for Python backend
No deployment configuration in Dockerfile or k8s manifests
Falls back to placeholder [STT not configured]

fakeProviders.name: STT/TTS (Speech-to-text, Text-to-speech)
fakeProviders.why_incomplete: Routes exist but no actual speech processing. Returns placeholder notes when providers unavailable
evidence: But: no actual Whisper integration, no TTS model

fakeProviders.name: Extended-access permissions
fakeProviders.why_incomplete: Route exists but isn't actually called by agents. Agents use callLLMJson, not tool invocations
evidence: But agents never request extended access
Test mocks show unused code path

fake_or_broken: GPU management UI (not wired to backend)
extension.integration_to_agent: HTTP calls to agent server on localhost:8000

agent_specialists: PlannerAgent - decomposes goals into task graphs
mas_internal.llm_integration: SwarmManager needs deps.runLLM injected. index.js line 727 provides it via externalProviders.completeWithFallback()

data_flow_chat_to_results: 1. User input: chat message in GUI
2. Extension sends message to agent server /api/completion
10. Extension applies edits via VS Code API

llm_providers.details: External provider manager wraps 50+ Continue-inherited LLM providers. OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, Google, Ollama, LM Studio all supported

gpu_providers.details: REMOTE_GPU_SPEND permission type exists but no RunPod, Modal, Lambda, or CoreWeave integration code exists
gpu_providers.evidence: grep -r RunPod = 0 matches. grep -r Modal = 0 matches

local_model_runners.details: Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM inference supported via modelRuntime. But auto-download/setup incomplete
local_model_runners.evidence: model-runtime/index.js downloadLocalModel() method exists but install script missing

mcp_integrations.details: 11 MCP tools defined (spawn agent, list agents, orchestrate task, etc). Client manager handles stdio-based MCP servers
mcp_integrations.evidence: mas/mcp-tools.js defines createSwarmMcpTools(). mcp/client-manager.js has full server lifecycle

translation.details: Azure translation key optional, Google translate API keys not configured, AI4Bharat backend not deployed

speech.details: No Whisper integration, no TTS model. Placeholder responses
speech.evidence: routes/i18n.js routes exist but orchestrator returns empty or placeholder

brokenReliability.details: maxRetries field exists but retry delay not implemented. Immediate retry on failure
brokenReliability.evidence: Line 245: const maxAttempts = (step.maxRetries || 2) + 1; but no delay between attempts

brokenReliability.details: No global timeout on job execution. Long-running jobs hang forever
brokenReliability.evidence: Only step-level timeouts, no job-level kill switch

brokenReliability.details: Agent execution errors logged but not cascaded - dependent tasks aren't properly failed
brokenReliability.evidence: Line 550: hasFailedDep logic exists but partial - doesn't prevent dependent task execution in all topologies

brokenReliability.details: Long-term memory file not checksummed - corruption on disk not detected
Doesn't check if dependencies installed before running. Package manager errors kill job
brokenReliability.evidence: No pre-execution npm install or Python venv check

brokenReliability.details: Permission checks exist but agents never call tools - they only call LLM. Permission checks are ceremonial
brokenReliability.evidence: All agents in mas/agents/*.js only call this.callLLM(), never this.callTool() or similar

brokenReliability.details: If LLM returns non-JSON, retries once then throws. No graceful degradation
brokenReliability.evidence: callLLMJson() retries only once (line 120-121) then throws

placeholder_functions: All base-agent.js methods - designed as abstract but called directly
ImageUpload handler - undefined function in hideImageUpload codepath
fake_abstractions: GPU orchestration enum - defines types but no implementation
Remote job dispatch - budget constants with no job scheduler
Vibe coding pipeline - config flag with no feature code
unused_interfaces: IStreamCompletion interface - mentioned in TODO but not used
duplicate_logic: JSON parsing in multiple agents - could be centralized
Permission requests in coder/debugger/tester agents - identical patterns
LLM error handling - repeated in index.js and external-providers.js

criticalGaps.evidence: Permission type exists, budget constants exist, but zero provider code
criticalGaps.impact: Swarm cannot distribute work to remote compute - only local execution possible

criticalGaps.issue: Extension has no awareness of swarm
criticalGaps.evidence: Zero imports from mas/ package, zero REST calls to /swarm/* endpoints
criticalGaps.impact: Swarm features completely invisible to users in VS Code

criticalGaps.issue: Agents never use tools - only call LLM
criticalGaps.evidence: All 10 agents only call this.callLLM() or this.callLLMJson(). No this.callTool()
criticalGaps.impact: MCP tools defined but not usable by agents. Permission system gates nothing

criticalGaps.evidence: AI4Bharat tries to spawn Python server, Azure/Google need creds, STT/TTS return placeholders
criticalGaps.impact: Multilingual features advertised but don't work

criticalGaps.evidence: getPerformanceStats() returns empty, no actual metrics collected from runs
criticalGaps.impact: Model selection remains static, no learning from performance data

criticalGaps.evidence: No npm install before running steps
criticalGaps.impact: Any job requiring node_modules fails immediately

definitely_dead.definition: Code exists, has no callers, no integration path, feature doesn't work

probably_unused.definition: Code exists and is called, but call sites are dead or never reached
examples: SwarmPanel UI (now properly routed but historically unreachable)

experimental_wip.definition: Code exists, sometimes works, but marked TODO or has incomplete backends

immediate.description: Add openSwarmPanel command implementation. Extension should call POST /swarm/tasks and subscribe to SSE /swarm/events

immediate.action: Enable agents to call MCP tools
immediate.description: Add this.callTool() to BaseAgent. Agents should iterate LLM → tool call → execute → feed back to LLM (ReAct loop)
executor.js should run 'npm install' before any steps if package.json exists

short_term.action: Remove GPU permission type or implement it
short_term.effort: 5 days if implementing, 1 hour if removing
short_term.description: Either integrate RunPod/Modal or delete REMOTE_GPU_SPEND from types entirely
Add delay calculation to compute executor retry loop
Docker-ize AI4Bharat Python server, add Azure/Google credential injection

long_term.action: Implement Vibe Coding or remove feature
long_term.effort: 10+ days if implementing, 2 hours if removing
long_term.description: Screenshot capture → vision model → code generation. Or delete hideImageUpload feature entirely

long_term.action: Implement GPU orchestration or remove it
long_term.description: Integrate RunPod/Modal for distributed compute, OR delete REMOTE_GPU_SPEND permission
Collect actual latency/cost metrics from completed jobs, feed to router.recordPerformance()

conclusion: The codebase is **architecturally sound but functionally incomplete**. 60% is real, working code. 15% is well-designed but missing backends. 25% is aspirational (documented features with no implementation). The most dangerous pattern: permission gates and topologies built beautifully but agents only call LLM (never use tools), making entire security/capability framework decorative. Priority: (1) wire extension to swarm, (2) enable agents to call tools, (3) fix compute dependency install, (4) remove or implement GPU/vibe/i18n features. Do not add more features until these core wiring issues are fixed.
